headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -60.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 3% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 172 quotes and an exceptionally high strong-intensity count of 147, driving the score to 61.4 — people are venting loudly today.
• This sits in the upper third of the 182-day range (–0.5 to 171.5), signalling well above-average frustration activity.
• Fears dropped sharply from 4.9 yesterday to –28.6 today despite 77 quotes, suggesting concern is present but not firing at unusual intensity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
